monitor.docker_hint: NAS users: mount Docker socket in container settings: /var/run/docker.sock
monitor.docker_mount_tip: Mount /var/run/docker.sock → /var/run/docker.sock when creating container, and enable privileged mode

readLater.title: Read Later
readLater.allReadDesc: Nothing to read, enjoy the moment

admin.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?

stats.view_logs: View API errors and operation logs

category.name: Category Name
category.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete category "{{name}}"? Bookmarks in this category will become uncategorized.
category.empty: No categories yet, click the button above to create one
category.batch_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} categories? Bookmarks in these categories will become uncategorized.

tags.hint: Tags are derived from bookmarks. Renaming updates all bookmarks with that tag, merging replaces the source tag with the target (auto-deduped), and deleting removes the tag from all bookmarks.

quotes.title: Quote Management
quotes.default_enabled: Currently showing: System defaults + Custom quotes
quotes.disabled_default: System default quotes disabled, showing only custom quotes
quotes.add_placeholder: Enter quote content, format: Quote content —— Author "Book"
quotes.empty: No quotes yet, click add button to create one

icons.title: Icon Management
icons.name: Icon Name
icons.empty_hint: Upload or add URL to create icons
icons.format_hint: Supports PNG, JPG, SVG, WebP formats. Max file size: 500KB
icons.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete icon "{{name}}"?

site.title: Site Settings
site.subtitle: Customize your website appearance
site.drag_upload: Drag image or click to upload
site.lite_desc: Disable all effects (aurora, meteors, 3D) for better performance.
site.weather_desc: Show weather info on homepage (requires location permission)
site.weather_city_desc: Manually specify a city, leave empty for auto-location
site.lunar_desc: Show lunar calendar, solar terms, and festivals
site.language_toggle_desc: Show language switch button in frontend menu bar
site.theme_toggle_desc: Show day/night mode toggle button in frontend menu bar
site.footer_text_placeholder: e.g. ICP License No. XXXXXXXX | Public Security No. XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
site.footer_text_hint: Supports HTML format. Leave empty to hide. For ICP filing numbers, public security filing, etc.
site.category_collapse_desc: When a category has more bookmarks than the threshold, only show the first N with an "Show More" button
site.category_collapse_hint: e.g. threshold 12, show 8: categories with more than 12 bookmarks will only show the first 8

theme.title: Theme Settings
theme.subtitle: Customize interface appearance
theme.auto_desc: Automatically switch themes based on time (6:00-18:00 light)

widget.title: Widget Settings
widget.subtitle: Control dashboard component visibility
widget.system_monitor_desc: Display CPU, memory, disk, network data
widget.vital_signs_desc: Real-time CPU and memory usage trends
widget.network_telemetry_desc: Display network upload/download speed and traffic
widget.dock_mini_desc: Mini monitor ball next to desktop Dock
widget.ai_assistant_desc: AI assistant entry in Dock & shortcut (⌘J)
widget.hint: 💡 Tip: Hiding widgets can reduce homepage data requests and improve loading speed. Save to apply changes.

wallpaper.title: Wallpaper Settings
wallpaper.subtitle: Customize page background image
wallpaper.drag_hint: Drag image or click to upload
wallpaper.size_hint: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP. Max 5MB recommended
wallpaper.click_refresh: Click the button below to get a random image

security.title: Security Settings
security.subtitle: Manage your account password
security.min_length_error: New password must be at least 6 characters
security.username_hint: Only letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens, min 2 characters
security.verify_password_placeholder: Enter current password to verify identity
security.username_min_error: Username must be at least 2 characters
security.username_format_error: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens
security.username_same_error: New username is the same as current

data.title: Data Management
data.subtitle: Import and export your bookmark data
data.export_html_success: HTML bookmark file exported, importable to any browser
data.export_html_hint: Export HTML: Generates standard Netscape bookmark file, compatible with Chrome / Edge / Firefox / Safari
data.no_bookmarks: No bookmark data in backup file
data.json_error: File format error, please select a valid JSON backup file
data.sunpanel_import_success: Successfully imported {{bookmarks}} bookmarks and {{categories}} categories from SunPanel
data.factory_reset_desc: Clear all data and reset to default
data.reset_success: Factory reset complete. Admin password has been reset to admin123
data.browser_format_hint: Browser bookmarks: HTML files exported from Chrome / Edge / Firefox / Safari
data.browser_import_success: Successfully imported {{bookmarks}} browser bookmarks and {{categories}} categories
data.browser_merge_success: Merged {{bookmarks}} new bookmarks and {{categories}} new categories
data.not_bookmark_html: Not a valid browser bookmark file. Please select an HTML bookmark file exported from your browser
data.import_mode_merge_desc: Keep existing data, append new bookmarks (skip duplicate URLs)
data.import_mode_overwrite_desc: Clear all existing data and replace with browser bookmarks
data.enriching_start: Fetching icons for {{count}} bookmarks in background...

ai.title: AI Configuration
ai.subtitle: Configure AI model to enable smart categorization and AI assistant
ai.api_base_hint: Leave empty for official API, or enter proxy/relay URL

login.title: Admin Panel
login.subtitle: Please enter admin credentials
login.hint: Use default account for first login

analytics.title: Visit Analytics
analytics.description: View bookmark visit data and trend analysis
analytics.clear_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to clear all visit records? This action cannot be undone.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.description: Explore all platform features and usage guide
docs.tip_1: Right-click a bookmark card on the homepage for quick edit, delete, pin actions
docs.tip_2: Drag bookmark cards to reorder, drag categories to adjust display order
docs.tip_3: Import bookmarks from Chrome / Edge / Firefox browser exports
docs.tip_4: Regularly run Link Check to clean up dead bookmarks and keep your nav tidy

bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
bookmarks.add_desc: Paste a URL to auto-fetch title, description, and favicon. Supports category assignment and internal URLs
bookmarks.search_desc: Search by title, URL, or description keywords, and filter by category
bookmarks.sort_desc: Drag bookmark cards to reorder on both homepage and admin panel
bookmarks.batch_desc: Select multiple bookmarks for batch delete or move to category
bookmarks.enrich_desc: Batch fetch bookmark metadata (title/description) and favicons, with option to only fetch missing items
bookmarks.detect_desc: Detect duplicate URLs and same-domain bookmarks with one click. Select to delete or keep only one per group
bookmarks.internal_desc: Set an internal/LAN URL for bookmarks to auto-switch when on the local network
bookmarks.context_desc: Right-click bookmark cards on homepage for quick actions (edit, delete, pin, read later, etc.)

categories.title: Categories
categories.manage_desc: Create categories with name, icon, and color. Supports table view and batch deletion
categories.drag_desc: Use drag handles to adjust category display order
categories.style_desc: Each category supports custom icons (Lucide presets, Iconify search, custom upload) and colors
categories.collapse_desc: Auto-collapse categories exceeding threshold. Click to expand more, preventing long pages

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.manage_desc: Add, edit, delete quotes displayed on homepage. Format: content — author《source》
quotes.default_desc: Toggle built-in quote library. When enabled, mixed with custom quotes

icons.title: Icons
icons.custom_desc: Upload local images or enter URL to add custom icons. Supports PNG/JPG/SVG/WebP
icons.iconify_desc: Integrated with Iconify library for searching tens of thousands of open-source icons

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.visit_desc: View total visits, today's visits, weekly visits, visited bookmark count and more
analytics.top_desc: View popular bookmark rankings and recent visits by time period (all/year/month/week/day)

health.title: Link Check
health.check_desc: Check accessibility of all bookmark links with real-time progress, status codes, and response times
health.dead_desc: One-click delete all error/timeout bookmarks to keep your collection clean

ai.title: AI Features
ai.tags_desc: Auto-generate matching tags, category and optimized description via AI when adding bookmarks, triggered after URL analysis
ai.classify_desc: Batch assign categories to selected bookmarks via AI, auto-create new categories if no match, concurrent processing with real-time progress
ai.enrich_desc: One-click optimize title, description, tags and recommend Iconify icons, multi-language output follows current UI language
ai.chat_desc: Smart bookmark search and discovery with semantic search across all bookmarks, context-aware responses with clickable bookmark cards
ai.config_desc: Supports OpenAI/Gemini/DeepSeek/Qwen/Doubao and more providers, custom API key and model selection

frontend.title: Frontend Features
frontend.search_desc: Open search box with keyboard shortcut, supports fuzzy search across all bookmarks
frontend.drag_desc: Drag bookmark cards directly on homepage to reorder, auto-saved
frontend.monitor_desc: Real-time display of CPU, memory, disk, network, process stats. Supports mini capsule / ticker bar / full dashboard tri-mode switching
frontend.theme_desc: Multiple dark/light themes available, with auto-switch by time of day
frontend.i18n_desc: Full Chinese and English bilingual interface support
frontend.readlater_desc: Mark bookmarks as read later, shown in a dedicated section on homepage
frontend.mobile_dock_desc: Freely draggable energy orb navigation with petal-style expand menu, bottom real-time status bar, position persistence
frontend.desktop_dock_desc: macOS-style floating Dock bar with free drag positioning, position memory, and magnetic magnification (fisheye) effect

settings.title: Settings
settings.site_desc: Customize site title, icon, beam animation, lite mode, weather, lunar calendar, etc.
settings.theme_desc: Choose interface color scheme with light/dark mode and auto-switch support
settings.wallpaper_desc: Upload or enter URL for background wallpaper with adjustable blur and overlay opacity
settings.widget_desc: Control visibility of system monitor, hardware info, network telemetry widgets on homepage
settings.security_desc: Change admin username and password to protect backend access
settings.data_desc: Export/import JSON backups, import browser bookmarks (Chrome/Edge/Firefox), factory reset

healthCheck.title: Link Health Check
healthCheck.description: Check if bookmark links are accessible
healthCheck.ready_desc: The system will check the accessibility of all bookmark links, including response time, status codes, and redirects.
healthCheck.checking_desc: Checking all bookmark links one by one, please wait...
healthCheck.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} dead (error/timeout) bookmarks? This action cannot be undone.

ai_assistant.subtitle: Smart Bookmark Assistant
ai_assistant.placeholder: Ask me anything about your bookmarks...
ai_assistant.welcome_hint: I can help you search bookmarks, recommend sites, or answer any questions. Try asking me!
ai_assistant.not_configured_hint: Please configure AI model in Admin → Settings → AI first
ai_assistant.error: AI response failed, please try again
ai_assistant.quick_1: Find dev tools in my bookmarks
